mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inbox_message ( notification_log_id, recipient_subject_id, portal_type, business_domain_id, title, content, jump_url, is_read, read_at ) VALUES ( #{notificationLogId}, #{recipientSubjectId}, #{portalType}, #{businessDomainId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{jumpUrl}, 0, NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inbox_message WHERE recipient_subject_id = #{recipientSubjectId} AND is_read = 0 AND deleted_at IS NULL
